calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset And To Dispense With Notice
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for Dwight Lee (Trustee).

The Court stated that it thinks it can find that the property is an asset of the trust, and dispense with notice to Edward based on the declaration that was filed. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset And To Dispense With Notice
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
